name: rAthena Monsters Knowledge Pack
description: Knowledge about monster databases, YAML properties, drops configurations, and spawn instructions.

entries.title: Monster Database (mob_db.yml) Schema
entries.summary: Structure of rAthena's standard mob_db.yml files.
entries.details: The monster database (db/import/mob_db.yml or db/re/mob_db.yml) defines monster parameters such as 'Id', 'AegisName', 'Name', 'Hp', 'Lv', 'Race', 'Element', 'Size', and list properties like 'Drops' and 'Skills'. AegisName maps directly to the client-side GRF sprite files (e.g. data/sprite/monster/AegisName.spr).
warnings: An unresolved Item Id in the Drops list will trigger validation errors and block Dry-Runs.

entries.title: Monster Spawns and Event Binding
entries.summary: Setting up spawns on specific maps and event triggers.
entries.details: Monster spawns can be defined in map scripts or YAML configs. A spawn entry contains 'Map', 'X', 'Y', 'Amount', 'RespawnTime', and optional 'SpawnEvent' labels (e.g. 'EventName::OnMyMobDeath'). Spawn events trigger custom rAthena scripts when the monster is slain.
warnings: Spawning a monster on a non-existent map or referencing a duplicate event name will fail validations.
